business_ideas.idea: Smithy Home Couture: artisan high-end throw pillows sold via Etsy and B2B wholesale
Dumpster Enterprises: lead gen for dumpster rentals via SEO and SEM arbitrage

predictions.text: Smithy Home Couture will scale to 7-8 figures with proper marketing investment and B2B expansion.
Local service lead gen models (dumpsters, pool quotes, senior living) remain viable 5-10M businesses.
